case_title: HAYWOOD, JAS VS NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAYWOOD, JAS AS TO DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA NIKCHEMNY, STELLA MACHINME, STACY NIKCHEMNY, STACY KEMP, STAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA NIKCHEMNY, STELLA MACHINME, STACY NIKCHEMNY, STACY KEMP, STAN

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-13-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-13-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD W/ CASE #'S 794019 AND 704089. STELLA MACHINME IS CORRECTED TO: STELLA NIKCHEMNAYA. STELLA NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. STACY MACHINME IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE.
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MACHINME, STACY
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA NIKCHEMNY, STELLA MACHINME, STACY NIKCHEMNY, STACY KEMP, STAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KEMP, STAN
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, STELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYWOOD, JAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.00, STACY NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT, STAN KEMP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED W/O PREJUDICE DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROOF OF PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF.
